title: My Stepson Forged Documents, Stole $300K, Left Me. So I Bought The Debt And Watched Him Fall
description: After my husband died, his son forged my signature, liquidated $300,000, and left me drowning in debt. I spent five years in a forensic audit until I found the forgery, got him disbarred, then bought the restaurant's own debt at auction for $18,000. Now I'm back in the kitchen. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #FarmToTable
thumb_text: HE FORGED MY SIGNATURE. I BOUGHT THE DEBT.

thumb_lines.text: I SPENT 5 YEARS AUDITING EVERY TRANSACTION UNTIL I FOUND THE FORGERY
